overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, exploring a dimly lit underground bar with vibrant purple and cyan neon lighting. The player character walks through the lounge area, visits a restroom with red emergency lighting, and returns to interact with the bartender.

moving deeper into purple neon-lit lounge area away from entrance

red leather couch with white trim in the lounge area

large cylindrical concrete column supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters a cyberpunk bar lounge marked by a prominent cyan neon arrow. The space features red leather sofas, glass partitions, and floating holographic displays. The lighting is dominated by purple and cyan neon, with concrete pillars supporting the industrial ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar counter area with cyan neon underlighting

events.description: approaching the bar counter with neon underlighting
entering the back corridor with red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bar counter and then turning into the back corridor

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking past the camera toward the lounge

entered.detail: curved white bar counter with cyan neon lighting underneath
black leather bar stools with metal frames
perforated metal screen wall with purple backlighting

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the bar counter illuminated by cyan neon underlighting. A woman in a red dress walks past as the player continues toward a back corridor. The metal mesh walls and bar stools become prominent as the lounge furniture recedes from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor and restroom with red emergency lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from purple neon to red emergency lighting
entering the bathroom area with white sinks and vending machine

agents.ego_description: exploring the dimly lit back corridor and restroom facilities

entered.detail: red lighting casting dramatic shadows on concrete walls
dark stain on the concrete floor near the bathroom entrance
row of white ceramic pedestal sinks with mirrors
illuminated vending machine with colorful display
large red poster for FORTUNA 2099 with violent imagery

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow back corridor bathed in red emergency lighting, revealing a bloodstain on the floor. The scene transitions into a bathroom with white pedestal sinks, a vending machine, and a prominent red movie poster on the wall. The atmosphere is tense and dimly lit compared to the main bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: main bar area with pool tables and active patrons

events.description: exiting the restroom corridor back into the main neon-lit bar
initiating dialogue interaction with the bartender
turning away from the bar to survey the main club area

agents.ego_description: returning to the bar, engaging in conversation with the bartender, then observing the club patrons

notable_agents.action: bartender leaning on the counter engaging in dialogue with the player
tattooed patron standing at the bar waiting for a drink

entered.detail: illuminated pool table with players gathered around
cyan neon strips embedded in the floor outlining areas

segments.scene_description: The player returns from the restroom to the main bar area, now populated with more patrons. After interacting with the bartender and a tattooed patron, the player turns to survey the club, revealing pool tables and neon floor accents. The lighting returns to the vibrant purple and cyan neon atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk lounge into a grim service corridor before returning to the bustling main bar. It begins by entering a lounge area defined by purple and cyan neon, moving past red leather sofas and holographic displays toward a glowing bar counter. As the camera pushes past a woman in a red dress, the open lounge recedes and the environment shifts into a narrow back corridor bathed in oppressive red emergency lighting. This tense atmosphere carries the viewer through a dimly lit bathroom featuring white pedestal sinks and a red movie poster before the camera turns back toward the main area. The scene finally expands once more into the vibrant club atmosphere, passing by pool tables and neon floor accents as the player interacts with the bartender and other patrons.
